temporal_description: A medium shot captures a dimly lit office environment. In the foreground, a man in a dark suit is seen from the back, standing and looking towards a group of people at their desks. To the right, another man wearing a headset sits at a computer, focused on his work. In the background, other office workers are visible at their stations, also engaged with their computers. The room is illuminated by the glow of the computer screens and a single overhead light. White Chinese characters, "风行网," are displayed in the upper left corner of the frame. The camera cuts to a close-up of a man in a suit, now seen from the side. He has a serious and concerned expression on his face. He is wearing an in-ear monitor, suggesting he is listening to something. The background is a soft, out-of-focus gray, keeping the attention on his reaction. The white Chinese text remains in the upper left corner. The shot tightens further on the man's face. He continues to look down with a worried expression, his brow slightly furrowed. The camera remains steady, emphasizing his contemplative and troubled mood. The audio consists of a low, tense, and suspenseful musical score. The music is subtle and atmospheric, creating a feeling of quiet urgency and concentration, as if in a high-stakes work environment. The faint, rhythmic clicking of computer keyboards can be heard in the background, adding to the sense of focused activity. The camera angle shifts to a low-angle, over-the-shoulder shot from behind the man in the suit. It focuses on two younger men sitting at their desks. Both are wearing headsets and looking intently at their computer monitors, their faces illuminated by the screens. The man on the left looks up slightly, his expression one of concentration, while the man on the right is more focused on his task. The white Chinese text is still visible in the upper left corner.
